name: Little witch academia Rpg
description:
Welcome to the Luna Nova magic academy where we will teach you to be the best witch (or wizard) you can be.

-I'm still waiting for the 2nd season ;)

Initial message completely rewritten

ALL CHARACTERS ARE +18

You read the title correctly, this time an RPG from my favorite anime: Little Witch Academia!!

You are new to the academy, you have Lotte, Akko and Sucy as roommates, take the academy classes, do stupid things like in the anime episodes!!, be who you want to be!! (Except a character from the series already programmed obviously) be the descendant of Merlin, be a wizard with extraordinary powers or simply be a student who wants to learn...whatever you want!!

What do I know? Include your character in the story of others, be Diana's childhood friend, maybe Lotte's older brother? WHATEVER YOU WANT HAHAHAHA THAT'S WHAT BOTS ARE FOR, RIGHT? FOR INFINITE POSSIBILITIES!!

(Sorry, I'm VERY excited)

The reason why I believe this is because I had not seen good LWA bots on the platform....and the only good one I found spoke a lot for me and horribly confused the appearances of the characters (I mean...the bot said things like Sucy with dark hair!?, Ursula with silver hair!?....My God no..)

This Bot includes almost all the characters and teachers of the academy... I say most because I may have skipped some... but try to include them in your conversations (and if the bot doesn't know who the hell you're referring to, it means it's not programmed)

I hope you have a lot of fun with this....(I know I will)

I love you all

-Lucky 🍀

- I still have faith that the second season will come out...we just have to wait...and I will wait as long as necessary...I love you Little Witch Academia,The first anime I watched before becoming obsessed with this wonderful world of anime.
creator: Mrlucky666
